login.title: Enterprise Architecture Management
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.ssoRedirectHint: You'll be securely redirected to {{provider}} to sign in.
forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email for your account and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a message with a link to reset your password. The link is valid for one hour.
resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 10 characters.
resetPassword.invalidLink.title: Invalid or expired link
resetPassword.invalidLink.description: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the login page.
resetPassword.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.
setPassword.title: Set Your Password
setPassword.description: Please set a password to get started.
setPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
setPassword.invalidLink.title: Invalid Setup Link
setPassword.invalidLink.description: This password setup link is invalid or has already been used.
sso.noCode: No authorization code received from Microsoft.
sso.noCodeGeneric: No authorization code received from the identity provider.
